name: pseudo-codex-console
description: Web console for pseudo Codex job intake and progress display.

scripts.check: npm run check:console && npm run check:agent && npm run check:dispatcher
scripts.check:agent: node tests/agent-no-sha.check.js && node tests/agent-controller.check.js && node tests/chatgpt-parallel.check.js && node tests/chatgpt-new-chat-route.check.js && node tests/settings-details.check.js && node tests/agent-github-direct.check.js && node tests/agent-verify-only.check.js && node tests/agent-host-native.check.js && node tests/agent-terminal-owner.check.js
scripts.check:dispatcher: python3 tests/dispatcher-git.check.py && python3 tests/dispatcher-github-direct.check.py && python3 tests/dispatcher-config-reload.check.py && python3 tests/dispatcher-host-native.check.py && python3 tests/dispatcher-parallel.check.py
scripts.check:syntax: node --check app.js && node --check agent/agent.js && node --check agent/chatgpt.js && node --check agent/fake-browser-client.js && node --check agent/mcp-server.js
